reason: RC-01 Go (2026-07-15, docs/rc/focused-core-rc.md §5): the Focused Core RC reached its documented Go after the §4.1 blocking items closed (review/merge #51/#52; budget freeze #53 with the ubuntu-latest reference run 29418826616 and ADR 0003 U2/U4/U5 resolved).
